_comment: End City (SKYENDPLAN Phase 3 flagship; Phase 5 biome-gated): a purpur tower + a cantilevered End ship on an end-stone island. Shulkers spawn for shells; the ship's chest (skyseed:chests/end_ship) holds a guaranteed elytra. Grows ONLY in its native End biomes — end_highlands / end_midlands (where vanilla End Cities live) — and fizzles with a hint in the central the_end (the dragon's), the barrens, and the small outer islands.
